summary: Added OEM-DP6 customer/account price-lock attributes to qrm_companies and exposed them through the crm_companies compatibility view. Defaults keep all existing customers unlocked.
verification: bun run migrations:check passed in a clean detached worktree containing migration 611.
notes: No customers are marked price-locked by default; this is a future hook for national accounts, government contracts, and annual price-lock agreements.
